title: save_tree_state is dead code after save_block_state refactor
description: After the scan_block refactor (save_block_state now atomically writes tree_state + witnesses + tip), save_tree_state() is no longer called in any production code path. It remains a public API that partially duplicates save_block_state (updates only tree_state, not witnesses or tip_height). A caller using save_tree_state() directly would advance the tree snapshot without updating the tip — an inconsistent partial write. Either deprecate/remove the method or make it private and for test-only use.
